scope: All answers derived from tenant-local operational memory, including LINE replies, portal responses, reports, and assistant tools.

checkOrder: authorize every raw source and attachment before retrieval
authorization.unassignedRecordPolicy: Only tenant-wide authorized principals or platform owners may access records without a reliable group or project relation.

structuredFirstPlan.action: classify intent, tenant-local project, people, topic, and time scope
load authorized current Project and ProjectGoal projections
load authorized relevant Task, Decision, KnowledgeItem, and latest non-superseded DomainEvent records
evaluate freshness, conflicts, pending confirmation, and unknown fields
retrieve authorized raw evidence only when detail, rationale, conflict resolution, or explicit source review is needed
rerank evidence by project relation, effective status, event time, source quality, and intent relevance
compose a bounded answer with as-of time, uncertainty, and provenance
persist an authorized AnswerProvenance log without copying cross-tenant data

rawSearchTriggers: user explicitly asks for original wording, file, or conversation
decision rationale is not represented in the current projection
current state is stale or low-confidence
an answer claim requires source verification

supersessionAndConflictHandling.effectiveRecordRule: Use the newest supported record at the head of a valid same-tenant supersession chain.
unresolvedConflictBehavior: do not select a winner without evidence
show the relevant dates and sources the principal may access
request authorized confirmation when the answer affects action
supersessionAndConflictHandling.staleProjectionBehavior: State the last verified as-of time and optionally retrieve newer authorized events before answering.

answerContract.language: Use the requester's language and tenant display labels while retaining canonical values in machine output.

confidencePolicy.belowMediumBehavior: State that the answer is uncertain and identify the missing confirmation or source.
factors: number and quality of independent evidence refs
presence of a confirmed project and goal relation

requiredBehavior: say what is unknown or conflicting
name the most useful next confirmation
do not invent an owner, date, completion, decision, or policy
